title: Cobblemon Evolved
description: The mod for the Cobblemon Evolved Minecraft Server!
body:
# The official mod of the Cobblemon Evolved Minecraft Server!

## **IMPORTANT! PLEASE READ:**
- This mod is meant to be played on a server, specifically using a database like Postgresql and Velocity as the proxy. It may be possible to play on singleplayer/LAN worlds, but I would not expect any form of stability. Also note: This project is early in its lifespan, so there may be some bugs.
- This mod is intended to be played on a specific modpack, and there are some dependencies that could cause issues if you use this mod as a standalone. You can find the modpack here: <link>

### Features:
- Competitive Ranking system! This mod features an elo system that functions similarly to the ladder in the Pokemon games. You get a default rank of 1000, and can climb up the ladder the more players you defeat. There are also tiers you can get for ascending the ranks, as well as tier rewards!
- This mod also features a save slots system just like the one in Pokemon! You can carry your inventory, Pokemon, and trinkets across worlds and have up to 3 separate saves!
- Has 1 custom Structure: the Chiyu Shrine, as well as adding in the legendary Pokemon Chiyu!

If you want to support me, you can join my Patreon. We also have a Discord server.
